release_notes:
### ShibaClaw v0.3.0 🐾

- **Release Automation**: Added documentation and helpers for managing GitHub releases.
upgrade_notes: Update to v0.3.0. Run 'shibaclaw onboard' to ensure all templates are up to date.

changes.note: Bumped the package version to 0.3.0 and aligned dependency versions.
Added the v0.3.0 release notes covering release automation and GitHub release management.
Documented the native Windows desktop launcher and updated release guidance.
Builds the portable Windows bundle used locally and in GitHub Actions.
Generates the icon set bundled into the Windows desktop executable.
Defines the PyInstaller bundle for the native Windows desktop app.
Adds the packaged desktop entry point used by ShibaClaw.exe.
Implements the native pywebview launcher, tray boot flow, and window lifecycle.
Manages the embedded gateway and WebUI runtime used by desktop mode.
Adds the Windows system tray integration for the native desktop app.
Hardens logging so frozen Windows builds do not crash when stderr is missing.
Wires cron service startup and shutdown into the gateway lifecycle and desktop flow.
Runs cron jobs through background workers so long tasks no longer block timers.
Supports the desktop launcher integration and local auth defaults.
Refreshes session rows with cleaner titles, channel badges, and sidebar polish.
Normalizes session titles by stripping channel prefixes before rendering.
